skill.name: Lightwheel Mark
skill.description: Karrie's Basic Attacks and skills apply a stack of <font color="a6aafb">Lightwheel Mark</font> on hit. Once a target has 5 stacks of <font color="a6aafb">Lightwheel Marks</font>, the marks will turn into a lightwheel, dealing <font color="ffe63c">True Damage</font> equal to 5<font color="fba51f"> (+1% Extra Physical Attack)</font>% of the target's Max HP to them (only up to 300 damage against Creeps).

skill.name: Spinning Lightwheel
skill.description: Karrie releases a sphere of surging energy in the target direction, dealing 250<font color="fba51f"> (+90% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> to enemies in its path. The sphere will stop upon hitting an enemy hero or reaching its max travel distance, continuously dealing 150<font color="fba51f"> (+20% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> to nearby enemies and slowing them by 80% for 1s.

skill.name: Phantom Step
skill.description:
Karrie dashes in the target direction while throwing a lightwheel at the nearest enemy, dealing 150<font color="fba51f"> (+70% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> and applying a stack of <font color="a6aafb">Lightwheel Mark</font> on them.

When in <font color="a6aafb">Dual Wield</font> state, Karrie throws two lightwheels instead.

skill.name: Speedy Lightwheel
skill.description: Karrie enters <font color="a6aafb">Quadruple Wield</font> state for 10s, gaining 20% Movement Speed. Each Basic Attack deals 40<font color="fba51f"> (+50% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> and throws 2 lightwheels that inherit a portion of Attack Effects.

skill_combo.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS
skill_combo.description:
Use her Ultimate to apply extra Lightwheel Marks 
with Basic Attacks and 1st Skill to slow enemies, 
and then chase with her 2nd Skill to secure the kill.

skill_combo.title: LANING COMBOS
skill_combo.description:
Use her 1st Skill to poke enemies and slow them, 

then follow up with Basic Attacks.

She can then use her 2nd Skill to chase or reposition herself.
